steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which punctuation option correctly connects the subject — 'Puerto Rico's museums' — to its verb 'showcase.' The rule: no punctuation may separate a subject from its verb.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — museums: the subject connects directly to 'showcase' with nothing in between. ✓
  • Choice B — museums—: places a dash between the subject and its verb. ✗
  • Choice C — museums,: places a comma between the subject and its verb. ✗
  • Choice D — museums:: places a colon between the subject and its verb. ✗
That confirms A is correct.
